Effect Explanation: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to it by attacks.
If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 60 more damage.
Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench.
Attach a {Team Rocket} Energy from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon.
During your opponent’s next turn, this Pokémon takes 80 less damage from attacks.
